# remnawave_subscription_request_history_stats (Data Source)

Returns subscription request history statistics from the Remnawave panel.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "remnawave_subscription_request_history_stats" "stats" {}

output "sub_history_stats" {
  value = data.remnawave_subscription_request_history_stats.stats
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `response` (String) Raw JSON response from the API.
